ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the node (0: male, 1: female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the node */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the node */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the node */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the node */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hiv_status" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "hiv_status" INTEGER /* HIV status of the node (0: negative, 1: positive) */,
  "art_status" TEXT /* ART status of the node (NeverOnART, OnART, etc.) */,
  "circumcised" INTEGER /* Circumcision status of the node (0: not circumcised, 1: circumcised) */,
  "cd4_count" INTEGER /* CD4 count of the node */,
  "viral_load" INTEGER /* Viral load of the node */,
  "hiv_diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of HIV diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that received the transmission */,
  "transmitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that transmitted HIV */,
  "transmission_date" TEXT /* Date of transmission */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., sexual, mother-to-child) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_transmitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmitter_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art" (
  "art_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ART treatment */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node receiving ART */,
  "art_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of ART treatment */,
  "art_end_date" TEXT /* End date of ART treatment */,
  "art_regimen" TEXT /* ART regimen used */,
  "adherence_level" TEXT /* Adherence level of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_art_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circumcision" (
  "circumcision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circumcision event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that underwent circumcision */,
  "circumcision_date" TEXT /* Date of circumcision */,
  "circumcision_type" TEXT /* Type of circumcision (e.g., medical, traditional) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of circumcision services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circumcision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circumcision_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that died */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "hiv_related" INTEGER /* Whether the death was HIV-related (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of testing */,
  "test_result" INTEGER /* Result of testing (0: negative, 1: positive) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of testing (e.g., rapid, PCR) */,
  "testing_facility" TEXT /* Facility where testing was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population group */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age range of the population group */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the population group (0: male, 1: female) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the population group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the population group */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population group */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the population group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_vmmc" (
  "program_vmmc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program VMMC event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that underwent program VMMC */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of program VMMC event */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of program VMMC services */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of program VMMC event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_vmmc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_vmmc_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_program_mmc" (
  "non_program_mmc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-program MMC event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that underwent non-program MMC */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of non-program MMC event */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of non-program MMC services */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of non-program MMC event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_program_mmc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_program_mmc_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmitters" (
  "transmitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmitter */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that is a transmitter */,
  "transmitter_type" TEXT /* Type of transmitter (e.g., HIV-positive, HIV-negative) */,
  "transmission_risk" TEXT /* Transmission risk level of the transmitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmitters_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "has_intervention" (
  "has_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention received */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that received the intervention */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention received */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date of intervention receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("has_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_has_intervention_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_has_intervention_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tested_past_year_or_on_art" (
  "tested_past_year_or_on_art_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing and ART status event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being tested or on ART */,
  "tested_past_year" INTEGER /* Whether the node was tested in the past year (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "on_art" INTEGER /* Whether the node is on ART (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "art_adherence" TEXT /* ART adherence level of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tested_past_year_or_on_art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tested_past_year_or_on_art_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
